faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately and we'll pro-rate the difference.
faq.q2: What happens to my favorites if I downgrade?
faq.a2: If you downgrade to Free, your extra favorites are safely stored. They'll be waiting for you when you upgrade again — we never delete your data.
faq.a3: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all new paid subscriptions, no questions asked.
faq.a4: Yes. All payments are securely processed by Stripe. We never store your payment details on our servers.
